name: Devimon

signature_move.name: Death Claw
signature_move.description: Pierces its opponent with both of its extensible arms and enforces its will on their body.

description: A Fallen Angel Digimon whose body is clad in jet-black cloth. Although it was originally a shining Angemon-species Digimon, by falling to the Dark Area , which exists in a spatial distortion of the Digital World , it became a fallen angel. As proof of that, the Mark of Evil surfaced dramatically on its chest. It has a cunning and fiendish personality, but it also possesses an outstanding intellect. It is said that those who have stared into its two eyes, which shine a deep crimson, are mind-controlled and completely dominated by Devimon. Its Special Move " Death Claw " is extending both of its extensible arms, and enforcing its will on the opponent's body.
